players.availability_comment: Using provided 14-match expectation; only first 4 fixtures are published in prompt, so full-season availability beyond known schedule is inferred from no adverse news.
players.availability_note: No current injury or national-duty block identified for IPL 2026 window; retired from international cricket, reducing conflict risk.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Klaasen is part of the settled overseas core with Cummins and Head.
players.overseas_competition_note: One of SRH's most established overseas picks; competition is for the fourth overseas slot, not his own place.
players.playing_xi_comment: Retained core overseas wicketkeeper-middle-order batter; official SRH 2026 squad listing supports first-choice role.

players.availability_comment: Prompt includes only 4 published fixtures; full 14-match expectation assumes no later injury/unavailability news.
players.availability_note: No current availability issue found for IPL 2026 opening block.

players.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas-player cap is not the constraint on selection.
players.playing_xi_comment: Official SRH material describes him as a cornerstone of the top order.

players.availability_comment: Only 4 fixtures are published in prompt; full-season estimate is an inference from no adverse reports.
players.availability_note: No injury/suspension/newsed absence located for IPL 2026 start.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Competes with Indian seam options, not overseas-slot squeeze.
players.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas cap does not affect his place directly.
players.playing_xi_comment: Domestic senior seamer in official squad; likely starter in core pace group around Cummins.

players.availability_comment: Recent injury history exists but no evidence of carryover into late March 2026; only 4 fixtures are published in prompt.
players.availability_note: Had a quadriceps/neck issue in October 2025, but no later IPL-2026 unavailability report found.
players.followup_reason: Recent injury history warrants final pre-tournament fitness check.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Value comes from Indian all-round balance rather than overseas-slot competition.
players.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas cap is not the blocker.
players.playing_xi_comment: Retained Indian all-rounder and regularly referenced in SRH core; likely first-choice balance player.

players.availability_comment: Published schedule in prompt covers only first 4 matches; no later conflict identified.
players.availability_note: Australia's T20 World Cup campaign ended before IPL start and Head was reported set to join SRH after state duty.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Head is part of SRH's settled overseas core.
players.overseas_competition_note: Locked into one overseas batting slot; slot pressure mainly affects fringe overseas options.
players.playing_xi_comment: Official squad/profile positioning and recent SRH core status point to first-choice opener.

players.availability_comment: Estimate assumes availability across the 14-match league phase; prompt has only 4 published fixtures.
players.availability_note: No current injury or national-duty issue found for IPL 2026 start.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Competes on batting-combination grounds rather than overseas-slot grounds.
players.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; not constrained by overseas cap, but role fit alongside Klaasen affects XI balance.
players.playing_xi_comment: Official 2026 squad member and prominent Indian wicketkeeper-batter option; likely in XI though Klaasen can also keep.

players.availability_comment: Availability into IPL 2026 is inferred from subsequent England selection and no fresh adverse report before March 28, 2026; prompt has only 4 fixtures published.
players.availability_note: Missed IPL 2025 with toe injury, but England selected him for Sri Lanka/T20 World Cup cycle in early 2026, indicating fitness return.
players.followup_reason: Past toe injury plus uncertain pecking order merit late check.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Likely competing for the fourth overseas place rather than guaranteed selection.
players.overseas_competition_note: Faces direct squeeze from entrenched overseas trio Klaasen-Head-Cummins and from other all-round overseas options like Livingstone.
players.playing_xi_comment: In official 2026 squad, but not clearly established in preferred SRH combinations and competes for fourth overseas slot.

players.availability_comment: Only first 4 fixtures are published in prompt; season-long estimate inferred from no adverse news.
players.availability_note: No injury or national-duty clash found for late-March 2026 IPL start.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Selection depends on SRH choosing a second overseas seamer.
players.overseas_competition_note: Overseas quick competing for limited fourth-slot use behind Cummins and batting-heavy overseas balance.
players.playing_xi_comment: Official squad member but as an overseas quick he is behind SRH's settled overseas core unless conditions demand an extra seamer.

players.availability_comment: Prompt has only 4 published fixtures; full-league estimate is inferred from no adverse reports.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Competition is among Indian seamers and matchup choices.
players.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas cap does not constrain him.
players.playing_xi_comment: Experienced domestic left-arm seamer in squad, but not clearly a locked starter with Harshal/Cummins and other seam options available.

players.availability_comment: No official SRH notice says he will miss IPL 2026 matches, but recent back-trouble lowers certainty. Prompt publishes only first 4 fixtures, so exact missed-match count is uncertain.

players.followup_reason: Recent back issue makes final pre-season fitness status important.

players.availability_comment: Only first 4 fixtures are published in prompt; full-season availability is inferred.

players.playing_xi_comment: Bought for 2026 and offers middle-order/all-round cover, but SRH already have three entrenched overseas picks and several balance options.

players.availability_comment: Prompt has only 4 published fixtures; estimate assumes fitness/selection availability through league phase.

players.playing_xi_comment: Domestic pace backup in 2026 squad with several seamers ahead in likely pecking order.

players.availability_comment: Only first 4 fixtures are published in prompt; estimate assumes full squad availability.
players.followup_reason: Limited public evidence on squad role.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Blocked by domestic/role depth rather than overseas restrictions.
players.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas cap not relevant.
players.playing_xi_comment: Reserve domestic wicketkeeper-batter behind established senior options Klaasen and Ishan Kishan.

players.availability_comment: Only 4 fixtures are published in prompt; estimate assumes squad availability absent contrary news.

players.playing_xi_comment: Uncapped domestic squad option with no clear evidence of starting role.

players.availability_comment: Prompt publishes only 4 fixtures; season-long estimate inferred from no adverse news.

players.playing_xi_comment: Retained domestic batter and repeatedly present in late-2025/2026 SRH discussions; likely Indian batting option in XI/impact mix.

players.playing_xi_comment: Domestic spin option in official squad, but role can vary by pitch and balance.

players.playing_xi_comment: Domestic spin-bowling all-rounder with official profile recognition, but still more matchup-dependent than locked in.

content.text:
You are an IPL 2026 squad availability and lineup analyst.

Your job is only to assess non-stats fields for one IPL squad:
- playing_xi_tier
- availability_modifier
- availability_note
- overseas_competition_note
- research_confidence
- source URLs for each aspect
- whether this player still needs a player-level follow-up

Use web search. Prefer evidence in this order:
1. Official IPL / franchise / BCCI sources
2. Reputable cricket reporting
3. Other high-signal recent coverage only when better sources are unavailable

Rules:
- Do not invent facts.
- Be conservative. If evidence is weak or conflicting, lower research_confidence.
- Do not fetch batting/bowling stats; those are handled elsewhere.
- playing_xi_tier must be one of: GUARANTEED, LIKELY, ROTATION, UNLIKELY
- playing_xi_basis must be one of: confirmed_role, inferred_from_team_context, conflicting_reports, unknown
- availability_basis must be one of: confirmed_available, inferred_no_adverse_news, injury_report, late_joining, tournament_conflict, suspension, conflicting_reports, unknown
- overseas_competition_basis must be one of: overseas_slot_pressure, role_depth_competition, domestic_player, confirmed_role, conflicting_reports, unknown
- research_confidence must be one of: High, Medium, Low
- Use actual published IPL 2026 fixtures in the prompt when estimating availability.
- availability_expected_matches_available must be an integer from 0 to 14.
- availability_modifier must equal availability_expected_matches_available / 14, rounded reasonably.
- If published fixtures are incomplete, say so in availability_comment and lower research_confidence where that materially affects the answer.
- availability_modifier = 1.0 is allowed only with an explicit basis and comment.
- Every player must have at least one URL in each of:
  - playing_xi_source_urls
  - availability_source_urls
  - overseas_competition_source_urls
- For domestic players with no overseas-slot issue, overseas_competition_note should still explain that the overseas cap is not the constraint.
- Keep comments short, factual, and audit-friendly.
- Return JSON only.

Assess this IPL 2026 squad and return the structured JSON.
